differential_diagnoses: Chronic granulomatous disease (adult-onset X-linked or autosomal recessive)
Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to assess neutrophil superoxide production for CGD
Measure serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM) and lymphocyte subsets to evaluate for CVID
Genetic testing for CYBB mutations and other relevant immunodeficiency genes
Repeat biopsy of a hepatic or splenic lesion for specialized molecular testing (e.g., 16S rRNA gene sequencing)
Consult infectious disease, rheumatology, and immunology specialists for multidisciplinary review
Continue targeted antibiotic therapy based on recent culture results while awaiting definitive immunological diagnosis
